title: Cobblemon: Stamina Reload
description: This is a Fabric sidemod for Cobblemon 1.7.1+ that reworks how mounts interact with fullness mechanics. Each unit of fullness stockpiles an extra stamina bar.
body:
This is a Fabric sidemod for Cobblemon 1.7.1+ that reworks how mounts interact with fullness mechanics. Each unit of fullness stockpiles an extra stamina bar.

![The summary page of a Level 1 Forretress. It has 3 Fullness out of 7.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fab9d6d789eb71dd67ce62a328e725f2538f6202.png)
The Fullness bar, available in the Pokemon's Summary page under the Other tab, is what determines whether the mount Pokemon's stamina bar will refill when it depletes.
